coin_profile.name: Amp
coin_profile.bucket_explanation: A Cash-Flow Protocol is a blockchain or app that earns real money from its users — just like a business. Every time someone makes a trade, borrows money, or uses the network, it collects a small fee. The more people use it, the more fees it earns. We value these tokens similarly to how you would value a business — by looking at how much it earns versus what investors are paying for it.

moat.rationale: AMP has virtually no protocol moat due to complete lack of network effects, minimal token utility (holders capture no real economic value), and zero ecosystem lock-in; the protocol is easily forklable with no defensibility advantage, and despite decent dilution control (8/10), the protocol maturity score of 1/10 indicates it's either nascent or failed to achieve product-market fit.
